```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(jsonlite)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 1) File paths
# =========================
input_csv  <- "../paper_sampling/data/papers_coded.csv"
output_json <- "../papers.json"
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 3) Helper functions
# =========================

na_if_blank <- function(x) {
  x <- str_trim(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  x
}

clean_scalar <- function(x) {
  x <- na_if_blank(x)
  ifelse(is.na(x), NA_character_, x)
}

split_multi_value <- function(x) {
  x <- clean_scalar(x)
  if (is.na(x)) return(character(0))

  # split on semicolons or line breaks (\n or \r\n)
  parts <- str_split(x, "\\s*;\\s*|\\r?\\n+")[[1]]

  parts %>%
    str_squish() %>%
    discard(~ .x == "")
}

normalize_values <- function(values, map) {
  if (length(values) == 0) return(character(0))
  out <- ifelse(values %in% names(map), unname(map[values]), values)
  unique(out)
}

clean_doi <- function(x) {
  x <- clean_scalar(x)
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA_character_)

  x <- str_remove(x, "^https?://(dx\\.)?doi\\.org/")
  x <- str_remove(x, "^doi:\\s*")
  str_trim(x)
}

maybe_doi_url <- function(doi) {
  if (is.na(doi) || doi == "") return(NA_character_)
  paste0("https://doi.org/", doi)
}

compact_record <- function(x) {
  # remove NULLs but keep empty vectors if desired
  x[!vapply(x, is.null, logical(1))]
}
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 4) Read CSV
# =========================

df <- read_csv(
  input_csv,
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  quote = "\""
)
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 5) Convert rows
# =========================

records <- pmap(df, function(...) {
  row <- list(...)

  title    <- clean_scalar(row[["title"]])
  venue    <- clean_scalar(row[["venue"]])
  year_raw <- row[["year"]]
  abstract <- clean_scalar(row[["abstract"]])

  authors <- split_multi_value(row[["authors"]])

  # Optional keywords column
  keywords <- split_multi_value(row[["keywords"]])

  specified_audience <- row[["specified audience"]] %>%
    split_multi_value()
    # normalize_values(normalize_cast_audience)

  role <- row[["specified role of visualization"]] %>%
    split_multi_value()
    # normalize_values(normalize_role)

  evaluation_environment <- row[["evaluation setting"]] %>%
    split_multi_value()
    # normalize_values(normalize_environment)

  evaluation_measures <- row[["evaluation measures"]] %>%
    split_multi_value()
    # normalize_values(normalize_measures)

  doi_clean <- clean_doi(row[["doi"]])
  doi_url   <- maybe_doi_url(doi_clean)

  year_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(year_raw))
  if (is.na(year_num)) year_num <- NULL

  record <- list(
    title = if (!is.na(title)) unbox(title) else NULL,
    authors = if (length(authors) > 0) authors else character(0),
    year = unbox(year_num),
    venue = if (!is.na(venue)) unbox(venue) else NULL,
    doi = if (!is.na(doi_clean)) unbox(doi_clean) else NULL,
    doi_url = if (!is.na(doi_url)) unbox(doi_url) else NULL,
    abstract = if (!is.na(abstract)) unbox(abstract) else NULL,
    specified_audience = specified_audience,
    role = role,
    evaluation_environment = evaluation_environment,
    evaluation_measures = evaluation_measures
    # Uncomment this if you want keywords as another grouped filter in the site:
    # ,keywords = keywords
  )

  compact_record(record)
})
```

```{r}
# =========================
# 6) Write JSON
# =========================

write_json(
  records,
  output_json,
  pretty = TRUE,
  auto_unbox = FALSE,
  null = "null"
)

cat("Wrote JSON to:", output_json, "\n")
```
